stories.title: Set up a project and track time
stories.intro: Timetrack logs hours against projects for you and your agents. Sign in, create a company and a project, and your monthly timesheet is ready — log entries in the browser or let an agent post them over the API.

steps.title: Sign in with one click
steps.caption: One click and you are in. Your timesheet opens on the current month — empty until you set up a project to book against.

steps.title: Set up companies and projects
steps.caption: Time is booked against a project, and projects live under a company. Add a company, then a project for each thing you work on — clients, internal work, a side build.

steps.title: Log a day
steps.caption: Pick a day, choose the project, enter start and end (or a plain duration) and log it. An agent can post the same entries over the API, so a full timesheet falls out of the work you already track.
